race.comment: TAHNI TALK (7) finished off strongly from the back of the pack when running behind a smart one who jumped favourite in a Derby lead-up last time out. Out to 2100m now looks ideal for him and it wouldn't surprise to see him sit closer in the run. Has plenty of upside and can return to winning ways. FEY KING (2) steps out in trip today which looks a good move on his form from last campaign. He's building nicely after a very long time off and this looks a good opportunity for him to return to the winners' list. ETERNAL ROMANCE (11) got the job done in a photo here two back before a 0.3L defeat most recently at Ascot. Back to the scene of the crime today and she has enough speed to roll across from the wide draw. Can go one better today. CHEYNE BAY (1) dropped back to 1800m last start and was too good. Back out to this distance now but he can go close if he runs up to his latest figures. ROYAL SPLENDOUR (3) is not out of this on her latest efforts.
